PeriodicalMS — Design System
Foundations
Colours Typography Spacing & Radius Icons
Components
Buttons Text inputs Select / Dropdown Radio Badges & Pills Avatar Navigation Cards Publication cards Tables Toast / Alert Modals Tabs Progressive sections Date picker Loading Empty states Screen inventory
Design System
Every component, state, and token used across PeriodicalMS. Inspired by Tyler Coderre's Design Systems Checklist.
Colours
Semantic colour tokens used across all screens. Each colour has a defined role.
Navy
#232B69
--n · Primary brand, nav, buttons
Navy 2
#3442A0
--n2 · Hover state
Blue
#50C7FF
--b · Accent
Blue 2
#1A8FCC
--b2 · Links, text accents
Green
#5CC78E
--g · Success, active
Amber
#FCB940
--am · Warning, saved
Red
#FF6C61
--r · Error, destructive
Cream
#FAF8F4
--c · Page background
Cream 2
#F0EBE1
--c2 · Card backgrounds
Ink
#1A1A23
--k · Primary text
Ink 2
#636369
--k2 · Secondary text
Ink 3
#72727A
--k3 · Tertiary / labels
Typography
Three typefaces — display, body, and data. Body updated to DM Sans (v34). Each with defined weight and size roles.
Display — Fraunces
Heading H1 — 36px/700
Heading H2 — 28px/700
Heading H3 — 22px/600
Body — DM Sans
Body large — 15px/500 · Used for section titles, card headings
Body default — 13px/500 · Used for most UI text, table cells, descriptions
Body small — 12px/500 · Used for helper text, captions, sub-labels
Label — 11px/700 uppercase · Used for table headers, field labels, section labels
Data — DM Mono
Monospace 13px — order numbers, codes, dates
Spacing & Border radius
Base-4 spacing scale. Six radius tokens from tight to pill.
Radius tokens
sm · 6px
md · 8px
lg · 10px
xl · 12px
2xl · 14px
3xl · 16px
full · 9999px
Spacing scale
4
8
12
16
20
24
32
40
48
Icons
Inline SVG, outline style, 1.5px stroke. 14×14px default, consistent with body text baseline.
Cart
Calendar
Info
Warning
Check
Close
Filter
User
Settings
Arrow right
Chevron down
Arrow left (sign out)
Buttons
Four variants: Primary (navy), Outline (bordered), Ghost (text link), Destructive (red). Two sizes: default (38px) and small.
Primary
Default
Disabled
Hover
Large
Small
Outline
Default
Disabled
Hover
Ghost (text link)
Default
Accent
Danger
Disabled
Icon button (remove)
Remove
Text inputs
Used in class tables, forms, OTP entry. 36px height, 1.5px border, focus state shifts to navy.
This field is required.
Select / Dropdown
Used for school selection, filters, status. 48px height, custom chevron arrow, full-width by default.
Radio / Option selector
Used for Fixed vs Flexible delivery selection. Radio inputs inside label cards — selected state gets navy border + tinted background.
Badges & Pills
Status indicators, language chips, date counter, cart badge, filter badge. All use semantic colour + text label — never colour alone.
Order status pills
Active
Active
Submitted
Submitted
Draft
Draft
Language chips
English
English
Chinese
Chinese
Malay
Malay
Tamil
Tamil
Language filter pills
Selected
Default
Date counter
0 of 10 selected
Incomplete
10 of 10 selected
Complete
Cart badge
1
Cart count
2
Filter badge
Avatar
Initials fallback with navy background. Used in nav with dropdown. Caret indicates expandable menu.
BK
Default
BK
Westfield Primary
With name + caret
Navigation
56px sticky nav bar. Light variant (white) used on dashboard/content screens. Dark variant (navy) used on auth. Contains brand lockup, nav links, cart icon, avatar.
1
BK
Westfield Primary
Light nav — used on all logged-in screens
Dark nav — used on VT and SB utility screens
Avatar dropdown
[email protected]
Westfield Primary School
[email protected]
Cards
White container with subtle shadow. Used as content wrappers across dashboard, order detail, cart. Also used as cart items (ci/cib).
Default card
White background, subtle shadow, 12px radius. Used as content wrapper across dashboard and order detail screens.
Cart item header (cih)
The Meridian Tribune
School
Westfield Primary
Classes
4A, 4B
Qty
58
Publication cards
Used in order form Section 1 for publication selection. Default, hover, and selected states. Language chip top-right. 2-col grid on desktop, 1-col on mobile.
The Meridian Tribune
The Meridian Tribune
English
Default state
Young Readers
Young Readers
English
Selected state — navy border + checkmark
Xinhua Junior
Xinhua Junior
Chinese
Hover state
Tables
Three table variants: orders table (.otbl), data table (.tbl), and review table (.rvt). All convert to cards on ≤768px using data-label attributes.
Orders table (.otbl) — S8 dashboard
SchoolPublicationScheduleClassesQtyStatus
Westfield PrimaryThe Meridian TribuneFixed — Daily2 classes58Draft
Westfield PrimaryYoung ReadersFixed — Daily2 classes54Active
Data table (.tbl) — class input, delivery schedule
Class nameCopies
Total281
Review table (.rvt) — order detail, review step
PublicationThe Meridian Tribune
SchoolWestfield Primary School
Classes4A, 4B — 58 copies
ScheduleFixed delivery
Toast & Alerts
Inline toast (.toast) for dashboard warnings. Notification toast (.nt) for inline field errors. Top-right toast for success feedback.
Warning toast (S8 dashboard)
Order season closes 15 Apr 2026
Submit your orders before the deadline to ensure delivery.
Inline error notice (.nt)
All classes need issue dates before you can continue.
Success toast notification (top-right)
Order added to cart
Review your cart before submitting.
Modals
Three modal types: confirmation/warning, date picker, and filter (mobile bottom sheet). Dark overlay backdrop. Bottom sheet on ≤480px.
Warning / confirmation modal
Reset later sections?
Editing this section will clear your selections below. You will need to re-enter them.
Cancel order modal
Cancel this order?
This will remove the order permanently. This action cannot be undone.
Tabs
Used on delivery schedule screen (SS). Active tab has navy underline + bold text. Inactive tab is grey text.
Active tab: navy underline, bold. Inactive: grey text, no underline.
Progressive sections (Order form)
Three states: locked (greyed, no interaction), active (navy border, open body), done (cream background, closed, green number badge, Edit button).
1
Active section
This section is currently open and awaiting input.
Section body content lives here — form fields, options, etc.
2
Done section
Young Readers — summary shown here
3
Locked section
Unlocks after previous section is completed.
Date picker
Multi-select date grid. 4-col on desktop, 2-col on ≤768px. Month headers as dividers. Cells: default, selected (navy fill), disabled. Counter pill tracks progress to 10.

Full-screen loading modal shown during new user onboarding. Animated spinner + rotating copy messages.

group
Version Tracker
Version history
OMS PeriodicalMS prototype — Meridian Publishing Group. All changes tracked per version.
v7710 Jun 2026
EnhancementS8AS8BOFS8EAmend
First-time dashboard, empty orders state, onboarding redirect, comp step split, amend classes lock
S8B — First-time user dashboard
  • New screen for users with no orders: S8B replaces S8E as the post-sign-up landing screen. Shows a "Place your order" heading with supporting copy, a grid of publication tiles, and the Resources column retained on the right.
  • Publication tile click: Clicking any publication opens the Order Form drawer directly at step 2 (package selection), pre-selecting that publication.
S8A — Empty orders dashboard
  • Empty state for My orders and Other orders tabs: When either tab is active with no orders, the table and filters are hidden, replaced by a plain container with contextual copy and a New order button.
  • Tab-specific copy: My orders shows a generic empty prompt; Other orders shows "Orders placed by other teachers or staff will appear here."
S0 — Sign-up completion redirect
  • Post-sign-up destination changed: Completing the S0 onboarding flow now lands users on S8B (first-time dashboard) instead of S8E (order form).
OF & S8E — Complimentary copies as a separate step
  • Step 3 split: Classes & copies (step 3) now ends with a Proceed button. Complimentary copies is a new dedicated step 4, unlocked only after step 3 is confirmed.
  • Edit resets comp: Editing step 3 re-locks step 4, requiring the user to re-assign complimentary copies after any changes.
  • Steps renumbered: Scheduling is now step 5, Pricing & payment is step 6.
Amend — Classes drawer comp lock
  • Classes collapse after confirming: After clicking Confirm copies in the classes & copies amend drawer, the table collapses to a summary bar showing class count and total copies, with an Edit button.
  • Edit re-opens classes, hides comp: Clicking Edit re-expands the class table and hides the complimentary section, requiring the user to re-confirm copies before reassigning comp.
v758 Jun 2026
EnhancementFixOFS8ES8
▼
Order form restructure — merged copies steps, draft behaviour, copy + UX fixes
Global — Terminology
  • Complementary → Complimentary: All 33 instances of "complementary" replaced with "complimentary" across all screens and drawers.
OF + S8E — Order form steps restructured
  • Steps merged: Former step 4 (Complimentary copies) is now embedded inside step 2 (Classes & copies). The order form now has 4 steps: Publication, Select your package, Classes & copies, Scheduling, Pricing & payment.
  • Trigger button: After filling in classes and copies, a "Calculate complimentary copies" button reveals the complimentary copies sub-section within the same step — pre-populated silently using the formula. No formula is shown to the user.
  • Confirm button: A single "Proceed" button at the bottom of the complimentary sub-section confirms the entire step and advances to Scheduling.
  • Step numbers updated: Displayed step numbers renumbered — Classes & copies is now 2, Scheduling is 3, Pricing & payment is 4.
  • Edit resets comp: When user clicks Edit on step 2, the complimentary sub-section hides and the trigger button reappears, forcing a fresh calculation after edits.
OF + S8E — Button labels
  • All step continue buttons renamed to "Proceed": Applies to Select your package, Classes & copies (comp confirm), and Scheduling in both OF and S8E. Place order button unchanged.
  • Package format — no default pre-selection: Removed auto-select of Print + Digital when step 1b opens. ZB Comma still auto-selects Digital Only. All other publications start with no selection.
OF only — Save & exit removed
  • Save & exit button removed from the OF drawer header.
S8 — Draft order behaviour
  • Thumbs Up Junior draft: Clicking a draft order row now opens the OF drawer with steps 1–2 pre-filled as done and Scheduling (step 3) as the active step, matching where the draft was left off.
  • Save & exit retained for drafts: The save & exit button is shown by default when resuming a draft order.
OF + S8E — Flexible schedule date preservation
  • Edit classes without losing dates: When editing step 2 on a flexible schedule order, previously assigned issue dates are now preserved per class by name. Removed classes lose their dates; retained classes keep theirs; newly added classes start empty.
  • Restored rows show date count: Flex rows with restored dates display "X dates selected" in green with an "Edit dates" link instead of "No dates selected".
OF + S8E — Edit warning modal
  • Labels updated: Title changed from "Reset later sections?" to "Continue editing?". Body updated to "Editing this step may affect your progress below." Buttons relabelled: "Keep current selections" → "Cancel", "Yes, edit this section" → "Yes, proceed".
v744 Jun 2026
EnhancementSSSDSSDOFS8E
▼
Amend button alignment + ZB Comma format + schedule table columns
SD / SDS / CLS — Amend confirm buttons
  • Right-aligned short primary: Confirm change (pay-drawer), Confirm schedule (SDS), Confirm copies (cls-drawer), and Make changes (cls-drawer) buttons changed from full-width to short right-aligned, matching the new order flow button style.
OF + S8E — ZB Comma publication format
  • Print + Digital removed: For ZB Comma publications, the Print + Digital format tile is now hidden entirely instead of shown as disabled. Only Digital is available. Applies to both the empty dashboard new order flow (OF) and the existing order edit flow (S8E).
SS — Schedule table columns
  • Issue date column added: New column inserted after No. of issues showing the issue date (3 days before the delivery date).
  • Delivery Status column: Merged the former Delivery date and Status columns into a single Delivery Status column. Upcoming rows show "Pending delivery" (no date); delivered rows show "Delivered on DD Mon YYYY".
v7320 May 2026
FeatureEnhancementCopyS8S0SAC
▼
Flexible schedule amend flow + contact number relabelling
S8 — Dashboard
  • New order row: Added The Straits Times — Little Red Dot (Print + Digital, Active, 20 issues) as a 5th order submitted by "me", with a flexible delivery schedule. Clicking the row opens the SDF detail drawer.
SDF — Flexible order detail drawer
  • Matches SD structure: Drawer includes Order summary, Payment (with Change link → pay-drawer), Classes & copies (with Amend → cls-drawer), and Issues schedule with a static summary and Amend button.
  • Issues schedule summary: Displays a Flexible badge, stat cards showing 15 delivered / 5 upcoming, and the 5 upcoming issue date pills (27 May, 3, 10, 17, 24 Jun).
SDS — Amend schedule sub-drawer
  • Classes view: Lists class groups (4 × Independent, 5 × Independent) with individual Select dates links and a bulk "Apply dates to 2 classes" action. A Confirm schedule button closes the flow.
  • Term-based date picker: Dates are organised into Terms 1–4, mirroring the order flow UI. Each term column shows its dates in a 4-column grid.
  • Edge cases — delivered dates: Terms 1–2 and early Term 3 dates that have been delivered are locked with a dark grey fill and cursor:not-allowed — cannot be toggled.
  • Edge cases — past undelivered dates: Past dates that were not delivered are faded (50% opacity, lighter grey) and also unselectable — visually distinct from delivered dates.
  • Edge cases — selection limit: Maximum 5 dates selectable (matching remaining quota). Attempting to select a 6th date triggers a shake animation on the cell and does nothing.
  • Save flow: Confirming the schedule closes SDS → closes SDF → shows success toast → re-opens SDF detail drawer, matching the existing SD amend pattern.
S0 + SAC — Contact number relabelling
  • Label change: "Mobile number" renamed to "Contact number" in the S0 sign-up flow (state e) and the SAC account settings Profile section (display label + edit form label).
  • Description update: Sign-up step description updated to "Please provide your school contact number."
  • Error & toast messages: Inline validation error and success toast both updated to reference "contact number" for consistency.

Each Tuesday brings Singapore and global stories, from national education to science, with ready-to-use activities for English, CCE, and cross-curricular lessons.

Chinese
Thumbs Up
面向小四至小六学生，提供趣味新闻、练习题、口试练习与模拟试卷等丰富内容，帮助学生扩展知识面，全面提高华文听说读写的能力。订阅包含ZBSchools.sg线上学习平台.
Selected
Chinese
Thumbs Up Junior
面向小一至小三学生，内容主题与练习题紧密配合课文，融入互动内容与趣味游戏，帮助学生开拓视野，从小培养对华文的兴趣。订阅包含ZBSchools.sg线上学习平台
Selected
Chinese
zbComma
面向中学生的线上学生刊物。以"读报教育"为核心，通过浅显易懂的方式介绍新闻话题，提升学生眼界与思维能力；亦紧跟时下热门潮流与话题，反映青少年心声。订阅包含ZBSchools.sg线上学习平台.

Thumbs Up Junior
面向小一至小三学生，内容主题与练习题紧密配合课文，融入互动内容与趣味游戏，帮助学生开拓视野，从小培养对华文的兴趣。订阅包含ZBSchools.sg线上学习平台

Chinese
zbComma
面向中学生的线上学生刊物。以"读报教育"为核心，通过浅显易懂的方式介绍新闻话题，提升学生眼界与思维能力；亦紧跟时下热门潮流与话题，反映青少年心声。订阅包含ZBSchools.sg线上学习平台.

Berita Harian Gen-G
Gen-G delivers relevant Singapore and global news every Monday, along with interactive word games and activities that help students build vocabulary and strengthen their Malay language skills.

Tamil Murasu Maanavar Murasu

Help Centre
FAQs and contact information.
FAQs
Go to Account Settings and select + Add school. Search for your school by name and select it. It will appear on your dashboard straight away.
Yes — use the Amend button from your dashboard or from your order details. You can make changes up to the deadline shown on your dashboard.
You get one free bonus copy per class — it's for the teacher. It doesn't count towards your student total.
Some publications are only available to schools in eligible regions. Contact our support team if you need more information.
